ocr.text: In Table 1, the metrics for Cross-validation indicate that with no post-processing, the precision is 68.0%, recall is 76.5%, and F-
measure stands at 72.0%. Conversely, with post-processing, these values improve to a precision of 82.0%, recall of 81.1%, and
F-measure of 81.6%. The Official Test results show that without post-processing, the precision is 68.0%, recall is 77.2%, and F-
measure is 72.3%.
Label  Precision  Recall  F-measure
Cross-validation  No post-processing  68.0%  76.5%  72.0%
With post-processing  82.0%  81.1%  81.6%
Official Test  No post-processing  68.0%  77.2%  72.3%
With post-processing  80.3%  80.5%  80.4%
With post-processing, dictionary  80.1%  81.8%  80.9%
Tooth  N  Overall (138)  CLL (6)  CLP (39)  CLPL (59)  CLPR (34)  p value*
%  N  %  N  %  N  %  N  %
However, with post-processing, these metrics are slightly lower at a precision of 80.3%, recall of 80.5%, and F-measure of
80.4%. An additional variant with post-processing and a dictionary yields a precision of 80.1%, recall of 81.8%, and F-measure
of 80.9%. In Table 2, under the Tooth header, for Tooth 11, N is 4 with overall percentage 2.9%, CLL is 0% with N 0, CLP is
5.1% with N 2, CLPL is 0% with N 0, and CLPR is 5.9% with N 2 and p value* is 0.232. Tooth 12 has N 13, overall percentage
9.4%, CLL 0%, CLP 12.8% with N 5, CLPL 3.4% with N 2, CLPR 17.7% with N 6, and p value* is 0.091. Tooth 21 has N 4,
overall percentage 2.9%, CLL 16.7% with N 1, CLP 2.6% with N 1, CLPL 1.7% with N 1, CLPR 2.9% with N 1, and p value*
is 0.296. Tooth 22 has N 15, overall percentage 10.9%, CLL 0%, CLP 10.3% with N 4, CLPL 18.6% with N 11, CLPR 0% with
N 0, and p value* is 0.028.
